---
title: "H3"
author: "Zhibo Yang"
date: "2026-05-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

packages <- c("tidyverse", "psych", "rstatix", "coin")

installed <- packages %in% rownames(installed.packages())
if (any(!installed)) install.packages(packages[!installed])

library(tidyverse)
library(psych)
library(rstatix)
library(coin)

A <- read.csv("../Data/A_135.CSV", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
B <- read.csv("../Data/B_135.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, fileEncoding = "latin1")

A$Ad_Type <- "Informational"
B$Ad_Type <- "Transformational"

data <- bind_rows(A, B) %>%
  mutate(
    Ad_Type = factor(
      Ad_Type,
      levels = c("Informational", "Transformational")
    )
  )

data <- data %>%
  mutate(across(Q1:Q20, as.numeric))

data <- data %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    Ad_Attitude_Median = median(c_across(Q6:Q9), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

alpha_h3 <- psych::alpha(data %>% select(Q6:Q9))
print(alpha_h3)

h3_summary <- data %>%
  group_by(Ad_Type) %>%
  summarise(
    N = n(),
    Median = median(Ad_Attitude_Median, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1 = quantile(Ad_Attitude_Median, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3 = quantile(Ad_Attitude_Median, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR = IQR(Ad_Attitude_Median, na.rm = TRUE),
    Mean_Rank = mean(rank(Ad_Attitude_Median), na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

print(h3_summary)

h3_wilcox <- wilcox.test(
  Ad_Attitude_Median ~ Ad_Type,
  data = data,
  alternative = "less",
  exact = FALSE,
  correct = TRUE
)

print(h3_wilcox)

h3_effect_size <- data %>%
  wilcox_effsize(
    Ad_Attitude_Median ~ Ad_Type,
    alternative = "less"
  )

print(h3_effect_size)

ggplot(data, aes(x = Ad_Type, y = Ad_Attitude_Median)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.4) +
  stat_summary(fun = median, geom = "point", size = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "Advertisement Attitude by Advertising Type",
    x = "Advertising Type",
    y = "Advertisement Attitude Median"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
